activity_name: Record the data of each patient

substeps.description: Open the Hospital Information System (HIS) and navigate to the patient registration module.
Select the option to create a new patient record.
Enter the patient's basic demographic information into the required fields.
Review the entered data for accuracy and save the record.

activity_name: Register the SSN of the patient

substeps.description: Ask the patient for their Social Security Number (SSN) and request their official ID for verification.
Enter the SSN into the designated field in the HIS.
Verify the entered SSN matches the official ID and confirm no errors.
Save the SSN entry in the patient record.

activity_name: Register the Name of the patient

substeps.description: Request the patient's official identification document (e.g., driver's license or passport).
Locate the patient's legal first and middle name(s) on the ID.
Type the first and middle name(s) exactly as shown into the corresponding fields in the HIS.
Double-check the spelling against the ID and save the entry.

activity_name: Register the Surname of the patient

substeps.description: Refer to the patient's official identification document for the surname.
Enter the surname into the surname field in the HIS.
Verify the surname matches the ID exactly and save the record.
Navigate to the referral document generation screen in the HIS.
Select the patient's record and confirm the registration details.
Click the print button to send the document to the printer.
Retrieve the printed referral document from the printer and hand it to the patient.

activity_name: Archive the record in file system

substeps.description: Ensure the patient record is complete and saved in the HIS.
Scan any paper documents (e.g., signed forms) using the document scanner.
Attach the scanned documents to the patient's electronic record in the HIS.
Confirm the record is archived and accessible for future retrieval.
